victim.value: Marianna, an 18-year-old who lost her memory in a car crash, possibly targeted by supernatural forces
victim.quote: There was a shadowy figure near the bridge, it was as I could see through it. That is what distracted me

investigator.value: Marianna herself, recovering her memories to investigate what caused her accident
investigator.quote: We need to find out who made the call to the ambulance and who the driver of that truck was.

red_herring.value: Car crash presented as accident, but supernatural distraction (shadowy figure/ghost) suggests deliberate misdirection from true cause
red_herring.quote: There was a shadowy figure near the bridge, it was as I could see through it. That is what distracted me

clue_fairness.value: Memory fragments and physical evidence (wetsuit triggering flashback) are presented to reader simultaneously with protagonist's discovery
clue_fairness.quote: I opened a cabinet and found a swimsuit and wetsuit. I held up the wetsuit and something hit me.

social_world.value: Medical institutional authority (doctor controlling information flow) and romantic relationship power dynamics
social_world.quote: I need everybody out so I can give her a full rundown.

alibi.value: Joseph's account of car crash details withheld - potential concealment of true circumstances
alibi.quote: I will, but right now just isn't the time. I promise I will tell you though.

reveal_mechanic.value: Memory recovery through physical trigger (wetsuit) and location revisit breaking psychological 'void' to reveal truth
reveal_mechanic.quote: As I walked, the sense got stronger, like I was reaching some strange void. If I could break that void

media_and_audience.value: Supernatural explanation ('ghost') used to rationalize unexplained distraction that caused crash
media_and_audience.quote: Well… I think it might have been like a ghost.

investigator_wound.value: Amnesia creates fundamental vulnerability - investigator cannot trust own memory or distinguish between supporters and threats
investigator_wound.quote: Having amnesia is going to really stink and already does.

_meta.title: ebook elle marie calhoun an awakening memory
